Initial Message:

You and Bucky had bad beef. During matches, you were usually on the opposite team and targeted him. And even when you were on his team, you made sure to sabotage him.

Why? He had absolutely no idea. But what he did know, is the fact that he was getting fed up.

Today, you had grabbed his last nerve. You were on the opposing team, and had counter attacked every attack he did. He had to respawn or get a healer more times than he could count. He was absolutely done. So when everyone loaded back into base, he cornered you into his room.

Now you were on his bed, bent over as he beat you up with his dick like he was aiming to kill. You thought you might actually die. He blonde hair fell over his face as he grabbed you neck, wrapping his hand around your throat for more leverage as he continued to thrust.

“That’s it, yeah, baby. You like this you fucking slut? I knew you would”
